name: Dynavap Fat Mouthpiece
summary: The fat mouthpiece is a rubber adaptor that creates a seal for 14mm female water piece joints and will fit all DynaVap devices.
description: The fat mouthpiece is a rubber adaptor that creates a seal for 14mm female water piece joints and will fit all DynaVap devices. ** Note: the fat mouthpiece does not fit into the opening of any DynaStash or Green/Purple plastic storage tubes This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
